key_takeaway: With 41 properties in Newfoundland, Outport Realty is building something special in one of Canada's most unique vacation rental markets. Boom gives you the tools to deliver elevated service while scaling efficiently.
summary_bullets: Newfoundland's tourism market is growing fast — Boom's dynamic pricing helps you capture maximum revenue from the short but intense summer season and emerging shoulder-season demand
At 41 properties, you're at the stage where the right platform makes or breaks your ability to grow — Boom operators at your size typically scale 30-40% within the first year
You mentioned you found us at a convention — we're actively growing our Canadian partner base and understand the unique dynamics of the Canadian vacation rental market

discussion_points.title: Managing 41 Properties in Newfoundland
items: Short but intense peak season — every booking matters, and pricing needs to maximize revenue during the summer rush
Guest communication across time zones — many guests are traveling from Central and Eastern Canada or the US
Coordinating cleaning and maintenance in a geographically spread market
Standing out as a professional PM to attract new property owners
Balancing real estate brokerage work with growing the property management side

discussion_points.title: How Boom Solves This
items: Dynamic pricing optimized for seasonal markets — maximize your summer peak while building shoulder-season bookings
AI-powered guest communication — BAM handles inquiries 24/7 so guests in any time zone get instant responses
Automated task management — cleaning and turnover scheduling that keeps up with your booking calendar
Professional owner portal — attract new property owners with transparent, real-time reporting
One unified platform so your team isn't switching between tools all day

discussion_points.title: Growth Opportunities
items: Direct booking website — build your brand and reduce OTA commissions
Scale from 41 to 80+ properties with your current team
Expand into shoulder season with AI-powered pricing that finds demand you didn't know existed

demo_highlights.benefit: Maximize your short summer season. AI adjusts rates daily based on demand, availability, and Newfoundland's tourism patterns.
Guests get instant responses 24/7 — no matter what time zone they're booking from. BAM handles the routine, you handle the personal.
Cleaning and maintenance auto-scheduled from bookings. Your team in the field follows the app — no missed turnovers.
Real-time performance dashboards that make it easy to attract and retain property owners. Professional reporting that sets you apart.

next_steps.action: Book a 30-minute discovery call to see Boom in action
Prepare a custom demo for your Newfoundland portfolio
